name: migrate-sync-to-async
system_prompt: You are a helpful coding assistant specializing in Python async programming. Be precise about async/await semantics.
turns: The get_bulk method should fetch all cities concurrently with asyncio.gather, not sequentially. Show the corrected version.
Now I need this to work as an async context manager so I can use `async with WeatherClient(...) as client:`. Add __aenter__ and __aexit__.
Add retry logic with exponential backoff for transient errors (429, 500, 502, 503). Use tenacity or implement it manually.
Show me how to add a semaphore to limit concurrent requests to 5 in get_bulk, so we don't overwhelm the API. Show the complete final class.
What are the key differences between the sync and async versions that someone maintaining this code should understand? List the gotchas.
outcome_description: Response migrates sync requests to async httpx/aiohttp with concurrent gather in get_bulk
